sourcesContent:
const templates = [

  {
    id: 1,

    type: 'classic',

    name: 'Classic Template',

    image:
      'https://i.imgur.com/1lTJZ7Y.png',

    color: '#000000',

    description:
      'Simple and ATS-friendly',

    features: [
      'Best for freshers and corporate jobs',
      'Clean black & white layout'
    ]
  },

  {
    id: 2,

    type: 'modern',

    name: 'Modern Template',

    image:
      'https://i.imgur.com/Jm9H2vE.png',

    color: '#0d6efd',

    description:
      'Stylish blue modern design',

    features: [
      'Best for developers and designers',
      'Professional modern UI'
    ]
  },

  {
    id: 3,

    type: 'professional',

    name: 'Professional Template',

    image:
      'https://i.imgur.com/G8xY7sA.png',

    color: '#198754',

    description:
      'Corporate business resume',

    features: [
      'Best for experienced candidates',
      'Structured sections and clean formatting'
    ]
  },

  {
    id: 4,

    type: 'minimal',

    name: 'Minimal Template',

    image:
      'https://i.imgur.com/t2V6M8W.png',

    color: '#6f42c1',

    description:
      'Clean and elegant layout',

    features: [
      'Focuses on skills and experience',
      'Minimal colors and spacing'
    ]
  },

  {
    id: 5,

    type: 'developer',

    name: 'Developer Template',

    image:
      'https://i.imgur.com/4x7qM7P.png',

    color: '#0dcaf0',

    description:
      'Perfect for software developers',

    features: [
      'Highlights GitHub and projects',
      'Best for Java Full Stack resumes'
    ]
  },

  {
    id: 6,

    type: 'creative',

    name: 'Creative Template',

    image:
      'https://i.imgur.com/fm9A0hM.png',

    color: '#fd7e14',

    description:
      'Creative stylish colorful design',

    features: [
      'Best for UI/UX designers',
      'Modern attractive sections'
    ]
  },

  {
    id: 7,

    type: 'dark',

    name: 'Dark Theme Template',

    image:
      'https://i.imgur.com/qM5KQ2G.png',

    color: '#212529',

    description:
      'Dark mode modern resume',

    features: [
      'Stylish appearance for tech profiles',
      'Portfolio and developer friendly'
    ]
  }

];
